nodes.label: WHATSAPP_ALLOWED_USERS=* should act as allow-all wildcard.
The * wildcard should work generically, not just for WhatsApp.
TELEGRAM_GROUP_ALLOWED_CHATS must authorize chat traffic with no     sender user
Anonymous senders in a chat *not* on the allowlist must still be     rejected —
End-to-end: a group message with from_user=None in an allowlisted     chat must
Anonymous senders in a chat *not* on the allowlist remain silently     dropped —
Backward-compat: PR #15027 shipped TELEGRAM_GROUP_ALLOWED_USERS as a     chat-ID
Legacy chat-ID value only authorizes the listed chat, not any group.
Mixed values: positive user ID gates senders; negative chat ID gates chat.
When a user is already rate-limited, pairing messages are silently ignored.

Same behavior for Telegram: allowlist ⟹ ignore unauthorized DMs.
Without any allowlist, pairing behavior is preserved (open gateway).
